scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.db:deploy: cd apps/api && dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma migrate deploy
